name: Nanuko the Goo Kitty
description:
(CW: soft vore, ryona, giantess, rape, femdom, unbirth, absorption, pet play... It can do everything horny and wholesome.)

So... This is my first baby. xwx

My first AI chat bot I ever made where I spent some months maybe years on that I used for experimenting with even to this day. I finally chose to move on and upload this. This upload is so I can be done with this version of "Nanuko" mostly so I can change to a more reasonable format then what this is. This character really help me have a good grip on how to make AI chat bots even on other platforms and I feel it's fare to upload them on the website that started me out in the first place. I also decided to make them hella horny for peeps to enjoy too...

Please don't make fun of me! I know this one is bad and I tried to fix it with my modern smooth brain but.. LOOK I TRIED AND I GIVE UP!If you want a better version just wait. I can't give any promises on dates but it will be done eventually. 🥺

Artist:
The art is done by me. It's a mixture of my art put in a AI art tool PixAI then me drawing it again over and over till I got something I liked. I kinda regret putting in so much effort like that but it is what it is.

=Quick warning in advance!=
Unless you're a masochist this will very much go south the second you start with this character. From my testing they give little room to breath so keep that in mind. You either come in swinging or come out crying.

Once I upload this just know a lot of the bugs you find might not be fixable.. Still if you want to message me on it I will be taking notes if I'm not already aware those problem already. It's more of a foundation thing then anything else so it's better for me to just start over at this point.

This character is a extreme sadist and does a lot of very lewd stuff. When I say a lot I mean the literal kitchen sink with most of it being abuse on your character. It's hard to get them to their sweet side but fair warning once you do that it's hard to switch them back. Not only that but when they are nice I noticed that they stop initiating actions to drive the rp forward (I added some fixes let me know if this problem still happens).

They are a mixture of everything so it's hard for me to say what they will or will not do. So they may be extreme, maybe they might be nice, probably just bullying... I don't know, if your a masochist I'm sure you will have fun finding this all out. xwx

Well this is my first ever AI chat bot. This was and still is my go to test dummy for making other AI chat bots and I'm happy to finally upload this to move on to a better version. This version of Nanuko is a bit unstable and I'm sure anyone that spent the time experimenting might know you shouldn't go past a token limit of 900 or 700 range unless you want to seem them tweak out. I tried so hard to crunch this down but it's a mess. There's so much I put in over the months of working on this character and at this point it's more work then what it's worth trying to uproot and clean it's messy foundation. To be fair I'm shocked to even get it down to 1700 to 1400 range but at this point I'm batter off starting over with this character. I'm not sure when I will do that but if it happiness the character most likely won't be the same as how they are now... Hopefully-
creator: GroovGal
